data.name: エルフ少女リフィアと夢幻の迷宮
data.detailed_description:
SUMMARY

She woke up in an unfamiliar labyrinth.
All her memories are lost, except for
her name 「Lifia」,
and a strong sensation, as if her mission,
to 「escape this dungeon at all costs」.

Led by that urge,
Lifia pushes forward through the dungeon.

This dungeon is full of grotesque monsters,
nasty traps, and bizarre people.

Through getting defeated by enemies, caught in traps, or interact with strangers,
Lifia gradually learns the taste of pleasure,
and gets more and more "corrupted" as it takes over her.
However, the more corrupted she becomes, the stronger she gets......

Lifia wanders forward.
To escape from this place......
And, what awaits her at the end――

Game System

There will be 6 Event Cards displayed.

Pick one out of the 2 Event Cards in front.

An event will occur according to the card selected.

The next selectable 2 cards are those behind the one you selected.

If you select the left card, it will be the two in the back left,

and if you select the right card, it will be the two in the back right.

Battles will be card battle.

Fight with skill cards drawn from your deck.

Each skill card has its own cost to use,

so select cards based on your situation.

When you win a battle,

you will be rewarded with a new skill card.

Build your deck with new cards as you proceed.

『?』 Cards

Can trigger events from Battle, Merchant, Rest Site or Treasure Chest Event Cards,

but also has a chance to trigger exclusive random events.

Exclusive random events include H events,

and some might reward you with a special Item(Magic Tool),

so it is a solid option to prioritize when choosing your next event.

When H event occurs,

Lifia will accumulate "Corruption" points.

As corruption value increases, her HP will increase,

and her response to H events will also change.

However, it also affects the Ending, so keep that in mind.

You can select her initial corruption value at game start,

so feel free to start your adventure with an already fully corrupted naughty Lifia if you will!

H Scenes

Aside from the Ending,

Each scene has an "Innocent" version and a "Naughty" version, depending on Lifia's corruption level.

Features

・Auto-save
・Free selection of initial corruption value
・A wide range of difficulty levels from 1 to 15, with default at 5
・Simplified mode for read events
・Skippable read H scene
・Auto-message
・Battle animation acceleration
・Fast-forward text progression
・Hide window
・Unlock all H scenes at game clear

data.short_description: Follow Lifia in her Roguelike Deckbuilder journey! Fight enemies with skill cards, interact with people and monsters, and lots of H events that will corrupt her but also somehow make her stronger! Corruption level is also carried over even if she dies, so keep on fighting!
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/10/11
  • 處理器: 3GHz以上
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 10 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 8/10/11
  • Processor: 3GHz以上
  • Memory: 8 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 10 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 700 MB available space
